dropzone.tagline: Instantly check your specification against 30+ USPTO drafting rules.
dropzone.title: Drop your patent .docx to begin local analysis
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse
dropzone.rejectMultiple: Please drop one file at a time.

dropzone.titleCn: Drop your patent file to begin local analysis

results.nonPatentWarning: This document may not be a U.S. patent specification
results.nonPatentWarningDetails: PatentLint is designed for patent application drafts. This file does not appear to contain standard U.S. patent sections, numbered claims, or paragraph numbering. Analysis results may not be meaningful for non-U.S. or non-patent documents.
results.nonPatentWarningCn: This document may not be a Chinese patent specification
results.nonPatentWarningDetailsCn: PatentLint is designed for patent application drafts. This file does not appear to contain standard Chinese specification sections (技术领域, 背景技术, etc.), numbered claims, or recognized formatting. Analysis results may not be meaningful for non-Chinese or non-patent documents.
results.nonPatentWarningTw: This document may not be a Taiwanese patent specification
results.nonPatentWarningDetailsTw: PatentLint is designed for patent application drafts. This file does not appear to contain standard Taiwanese specification sections (【技術領域】, 【先前技術】, etc.), numbered claims (請求項), or paragraph numbering. Analysis results may not be meaningful for non-Taiwanese or non-patent documents.
results.trackedChangesWarning: This document contains tracked changes, which may affect analysis accuracy. Accept or reject all changes in your word processor, then analyze again.
results.scannedDocWarning: This file contains only scanned document pages
results.scannedDocWarningDetails: The uploaded file contains scanned document images with no machine-readable patent text. PatentLint requires structured text to analyze. Please upload the original filing XML or a .docx draft instead.

feedback.reportProblem: Report a problem with this finding
feedback.confirmation: Auto-filled an error report in your email for your review. Your draft stayed put.
feedback.emailIntro: I'm reporting what looks like an issue with the following PatentLint finding.
feedback.bodyPlaceholder: [Please describe what you think is wrong with this finding. Do NOT paste claim text or any other content from your draft — a general summary is enough to investigate.]
feedback.footerIntro: I'd like to share some feedback about PatentLint.
feedback.footerPlaceholder: [Feel free to share bug reports, feature requests, questions, or general comments. You don't need to share anything confidential about your work.]
feedback.enterpriseIntro: I'd like to inquire about enterprise deployment of PatentLint.
feedback.enterprisePlaceholder: [Briefly describe your needs — team size, approximate document volume, jurisdictions you work with, and any specific requirements (e.g., self-hosted / air-gapped install, SSO, custom checks). I'll follow up with options.]

cta.heading: Ready to check your draft?
cta.subtext: Drop a .docx file and get instant results. No upload. No account.

antecedent.didYouMeanCrossBranch: Did you mean *{{term}}* (introduced in claim {{claim_id}}, which is not in this claim's dependency chain)?
antecedent.crossBranchAntecedent: Introduced in claim {{claim_id}}, which is not in this claim's dependency chain. Restructure the dependency or re-introduce the term with "a".
antecedent.crossRefSpecSupport: Also flagged for spec support — see § 112(a) below.

specSupport.title: Specification Support Review
specSupport.crossRefAntecedent: Also flagged for antecedent basis — see § 112(b) above.

security.airplaneDemoAlt: Demo: analyzing a patent draft in airplane mode with no network connection

badge.headline: No upload. No account. No install.
badge.description: Your file never leaves your device.

prove.step1: Turn off WiFi or enable airplane mode
prove.step3: No internet means no cloud, no upload, no data sent anywhere
prove.step4: After analysis, a green dot on the results page confirms zero network activity.
prove.testHeading: Don't take our word for it
prove.testDescription: This button fetches the PatentLint logo. Watch the log below to see how PatentLint detects network activity.

page.heroTitle: No Server. No Upload. No Exceptions.
page.heroSubtext: PatentLint runs entirely inside your browser. Your patent draft never leaves your device, and confidential data stays on your machine, always.
page.compareDisclaimer: Comparison reflects general architecture patterns. Individual products may vary. "Word Add-in Tools" and "Cloud-Based Tools" are generic categories, not specific products.

q1.question: Does my file leave my device?
q1.addin: File stays local, but add-in may phone home.

q2.question: Do I need an account?
q2.patentlint: No account required. No data collected.
q2.addin: Usually requires a license or account.

q4.question: Can I verify the privacy claim?
q4.patentlint: Yes. Open DevTools → Network, or go airplane mode.
q4.cloud: No. Data is on their servers.

q5.question: What platforms are supported?
q5.patentlint: Any device with a modern browser.

q6.question: What does it cost?
q6.patentlint: Free — no fees, no subscription, no usage limits.

q7.question: Is my patent text used for AI training?
q7.patentlint: Never. All checks are deterministic rule-based pattern matching.
q7.addin: Depends on vendor — some send telemetry.
q7.cloud: Often yes. Terms of service commonly reserve such rights.

tech.architecture: PatentLint compiles its Python analysis engine to WebAssembly via Pyodide and runs it entirely inside your browser's sandboxed JavaScript environment. No server-side processing occurs for document analysis.
tech.network: After the initial page load (which loads the analysis engine), zero network requests are made during analysis. Verify this in your browser's DevTools Network tab, or simply turn on airplane mode.
tech.pdf: PDF reports are generated entirely in your browser using pdfmake. Your document content never leaves your device, not even for the report.
tech.ai: PatentLint does not use AI, machine learning, or large language models. All checks are deterministic, rule-based pattern matching against patent office guidelines. Your text is never sent to any AI service.
tech.telemetry: PatentLint does not include analytics scripts, tracking pixels, cookies, or third-party integrations. No usage data is collected or transmitted by the application.
tech.selfHosted: On-premises deployment is available on private inquiry. Compliance with any specific regulatory regime remains the organization's own determination.

about.productTagline: A first-of-its-kind patent draft checker that runs locally in your own browser.
about.productDesc1: PatentLint is a free patent draft checker that catches issues for you before the examiner does. Drop a U.S., Chinese, or Taiwanese patent draft for an instant compliance report, processed entirely on your own device. No uploads, no accounts, no cloud.
about.productDesc2: PatentLint checks drafting rules from the MPEP (U.S.), CNIPA rules (China), and TIPO rules (Taiwan), detecting common issues such as missing antecedent basis, incorrect claim structure, and restrictive wording.
about.usptoSubtitle: USPTO Patent Center validates filing format. PatentLint checks the draft itself.

claimTree.title: Claim tree & § 112 walker
claimTree.description: Interactive dependency tree for multi-dependent and multi-independent structures, backed by a § 112 walker covering antecedent basis (§ 112(b)) and written-description support (§ 112(a)) — cross-linked when the same term fails both — plus Markush, Jepson, means-plus-function, and transitional-phrase checks.

specAbstract.title: Specification & abstract structure
specAbstract.description: Section ordering (MPEP § 608.01(a)), paragraph numbering (§ 608.01(p)), abstract word count (§ 608.01(b)), and figure-reference cross-checks between the drawings and the detailed description, among others.

specSupport.title: Restrictive wording & drafting guards
specSupport.description: Detects indefinite or limiting terms ("must," "always," "invention") across claims, specification, and abstract per § 2173.05(b); flags CRM claims missing the "non-transitory" qualifier under § 101.

check.antecedentBasis: Antecedent basis ("the X" without prior "a X")

about.cnSubtitle: 20+ structural checks against CNIPA drafting rules (专利法实施细则, 审查指南).

claimTree.title: Claim structure & antecedent-basis walker
claimTree.description: Interactive claim dependency tree with multi-dependent rendering, plus a BFS antecedent-basis walker using CJK bigram tokenization, subject-matter consistency, dependency-citation format, and bracketed reference-numeral checks.

specAbstract.title: Specification & abstract checks
specAbstract.description: Five-section ordering (专利法实施细则 §17), paragraph-ending punctuation, figure-reference consistency across 附图说明 and 具体实施方式, and the 300-character abstract limit (§23), among others.

dualPipeline.title: 五书模板 + CNIPA XML dual pipeline
dualPipeline.description: The same checks run over CPC 五书模板 Word drafts and CNIPA ST.36 XML filings; 段落编号 rules apply per input format (manual [NNNN] forbidden in .docx, sequential in XML).

about.twTitle: PatentLint vs. TIPO 偵錯系統
about.twSubtitle: TIPO 偵錯系統 covers Taiwan-specific terminology. PatentLint covers broader drafting rules.

claimTree.title: Claim structure & antecedent-basis walker
claimTree.description: Interactive claim dependency tree with a BFS antecedent-basis walker, two-part-form checks (其特徵在於 / 其改良在於), single-sentence rule, and reference-recitation independent-claim handling (一種X，具備如請求項N所述的Y).

specAbstract.title: Specification & abstract checks
specAbstract.description: Section ordering per 專利法施行細則 §17, paragraph-ending punctuation with strict/relaxed rules per section, figure-reference cross-checks, and the 250-character abstract limit (§21), among others.

symbolTable.title: 符號說明 cross-check (TW-specific)
symbolTable.description: TW-only 符號說明 tables parsed natively and cross-checked against 實施方式, 圖式簡單說明, and 代表圖 symbol usage — no other jurisdiction has this section.

twChecks.symbolTablePresence: 符號說明 required when 圖式簡單說明 exists (專利法施行細則 §17)
twChecks.symbolTableConsistency: Symbols in 符號說明 appear in 實施方式 (專利審查基準)
twChecks.patentTypeTerminology: Patent type terminology (本發明 vs 本新型)
twChecks.title: Title requirements
twChecks.claimsSymbolTableConsistency: Claim numerals defined in 符號說明 (專利法施行細則 §19)
twChecks.refNumeralParens: Reference numerals in parentheses (專利法施行細則 §19)
twChecks.specDrawingRef: Claims must not reference spec or drawings
twChecks.multiDepOnMultiDep: Multi-dep claim cannot depend on another multi-dep
twChecks.symbolVsRepDrawing: 符號說明 vs 代表圖 symbol consistency
twChecks.connectionRelationships: Independent claim component connection relationships (連接關係)

arch.selfHostBadge: Self-hosted for air-gapped and ITAR-sensitive environments

tip.pyodide: CPython compiled to WebAssembly. Runs Python in the browser
tip.pdfmake: Client-side PDF generation, no server needed
tip.fastapi: Python REST API for server-side deployments
tip.weasyprint: HTML-to-PDF engine with CJK font support

about.builderPain: Every patent practitioner knows the drill. Antecedent basis. Claim terms missing from the spec. Figure labels that appear in the body but never in the drawings description. Dependency chains that quietly loop back on themselves. The checks aren't hard. They're just tedious and easy to miss.
about.builderDesc1: PatentLint was built by a patent engineer who spent over a decade inside that workflow, reviewing thousands of drafts and watching the same categories of errors slip through again and again. Existing options were either Windows-only desktop installs or cloud services that required uploading a client's unfiled application to someone else's server. One locks you to a specific OS. The other sends the draft out of your firm before it's even on file.
about.builderDesc2: The analysis engine is written in Python and compiles to WebAssembly. It runs entirely in the browser, on a laptop, tablet, or phone, with nothing uploaded and nothing logged. That means it works on an airplane, on a locked-down firm machine, on anything a client hasn't signed off on yet.
about.builderSister: Its companion project, the Agentic Patent Analyst, covers the reasoning-heavy work, using in-house fine-tuned LLM agents for prior art search and claim coverage analysis.

details.firstGapParagraph: First gap at paragraph {{position}}. Renumber to restore sequential order per MPEP § 608.01(p).
details.firstGapClaim: First gap at claim {{position}}. Renumber claims sequentially per MPEP § 608.01(j).
details.missingSections: Missing: {{list}}. Add these sections before filing.
details.nounMismatch: Dependent '{{dependent}}' vs independent '{{independent}}'. A dependent claim must be of the same statutory category as its parent (e.g., both apparatus or both method). Correct the preamble noun.
details.seeSection112: See § 112 Analysis below for per-claim detail.
details.specSupportUnsupported: {{count}} claim term(s) not found in the specification. Under § 112(a), each claim term should have written description support. Review the § 112 Analysis below for per-term details.
details.restrictiveWordingSpec: Paragraphs: {{list}}. Terms like "must," "always," or "invention" may be treated as indefinite or limiting under § 2173.05(b). Review each flagged paragraph and consider whether the term unduly limits scope or introduces indefiniteness.
details.paragraphEnding: Paragraphs: {{list}}. Each specification paragraph must end with a period per MPEP § 608.01(p).
details.sequenceListingFix: Add a "Statement Regarding Sequence Listing" section per 37 C.F.R. § 1.821–1.825.
details.crossReferenceCitations: {{text}}. Verify serial numbers are correct and the priority chain is complete (continuations, CIPs, provisionals, divisionals).
details.priorArtCitations: {{text}}. Verify patent/publication numbers are accurate. Characterizations of prior art may be treated as admissions during prosecution.
details.optionalSectionGuidance: Include this section if applicable to your application.
details.restrictiveWordingClaims: Claims: {{list}}. Terms like "must," "essential," or "invention" may trigger a § 112(b) indefiniteness rejection. Review each flagged claim and consider whether the term is necessary.
details.multipleDependentClaims: Claims: {{list}}. Multiple-dependent claims incur additional fees and must not depend on other multiple-dependent claims (35 U.S.C. § 112(e)). Verify this is intentional.
details.selfDependentClaims: Claims: {{list}}. A claim cannot depend on itself. Correct the dependency reference.
details.meansFunctionClaims: Claims: {{list}}. Under § 112(f), claim scope is limited to the corresponding structure disclosed in the specification and equivalents. Verify that the specification describes sufficient structure for each means-plus-function limitation.
details.antecedentBasisTerms: {{count}} potential antecedent basis issues across {{claims}} claims. Each definite reference ("the X" or "said X") must have a prior indefinite introduction ("a X" or "an X"). Missing antecedent basis may result in a § 112(b) indefiniteness rejection.
details.preambleNounMismatch: Claim {{claim}} depends on claim {{parent}}. The preamble nouns differ but may be acceptable if they refer to the same entity. Verify consistency.
details.preambleNounMismatchSummary: Claim {{rootId}} uses parent noun '{{parent}}'; {{count}} dependent claim(s) use '{{dependent}}'. Verify whether these refer to the same entity or align the preamble nouns.
details.preambleIndefiniteArticle: Claim {{claim}} depends on claim {{parent}}. Dependent claims must use the definite article "The" to refer back to the independent claim entity, not "A" or "An."
details.singleFigureFix: Replace all instances of "FIG. 1" with "The Figure" or "the drawing" per MPEP § 608.02.
details.drawingsPriorArt: Figures depicting prior art must be designated with the legend "Prior Art" per MPEP § 608.02(g). Verify each prior art figure is correctly labeled.
details.figuresSequentialFix: Renumber figures in ascending order per MPEP § 608.02.
details.orphanedBriefFigures: Figures: {{list}}. Either add a reference to these figures in the Detailed Description or remove them from the Brief Description.
details.orphanedDetailedFigures: Figures: {{list}}. Either add a description for these figures in the Brief Description of Drawings or remove the reference from the Detailed Description.
details.restrictiveWordingAbstract: {{text}}. The abstract should avoid legal phraseology ("comprising," "said," "means"), merit language ("novel," "innovative"), and restrictive terms ("must," "essential") per MPEP § 608.01(b). Rephrase flagged terms.
details.abstractStructureFix: The abstract must be a single paragraph ending with a period, exclamation point, or question mark, and must appear as the last section of the specification per MPEP § 608.01(b).
details.abstractImpliedPhrasesFix: Phrases like "This disclosure provides..." or "A method is provided..." are considered implied phraseology per MPEP § 608.01(b). Rewrite to describe the invention directly (e.g., "A method that...").
details.abstractWordCountFix: The abstract must be between 50 and 150 words per MPEP § 608.01(b). Revise to meet this range.

cn.requiredSections: CNIPA requires 技术领域, 背景技术, 发明内容, and 具体实施方式 per 专利法实施细则 §17. Add the missing sections before filing.
cn.sectionOrdering: Prescribed order: 技术领域 → 背景技术 → 发明内容 → 附图说明 → 具体实施方式. Reorder sections to match.
cn.paragraphNumberingXml: Per 审查指南, paragraph numbers must be sequential and zero-padded (0001, 0002, ...). Fix the numbering sequence.
cn.paragraphNumberingDocx: Per CNIPA guidelines, specifications must not contain paragraph numbering. The WORD转XML编辑器 adds numbering automatically during conversion. Remove all manually added paragraph numbers.
cn.paragraphEnding: Per 审查指南, specification paragraphs must end with Chinese sentence-final punctuation (。, ！, or ？). Check the flagged paragraphs.
cn.figureRefConsistency: Per 审查指南, figures described in 附图说明 should be referenced in 具体实施方式 and vice versa. Verify the flagged references are intentional.
cn.patentTypeTerminology: Per 审查指南, invention applications should use 本发明 (not 本实用新型), and utility model applications vice versa. Verify the terminology matches your filing type.
cn.titleLength: Per 审查指南 第一部分第一章, the title (发明名称) must not exceed 25 Chinese characters. Shorten the title.
cn.titleContent: Per 审查指南, the title must not contain trademarks, model numbers, personal names, or commercial/advertising language. Remove the prohibited content.
cn.specClaimReference: Per 专利法实施细则 §17, the specification must not use language such as '如权利要求……所述的……' to reference claims. Remove claim references from the specification.
cn.claimsSequential: Per 审查指南, claims must be numbered sequentially starting from 1. Fix the numbering.
cn.dependencyFormat: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, dependent claims must use the format '如权利要求N所述的……' to reference parent claims. Fix the flagged claims.
cn.selfDependent: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, a claim cannot depend on itself. Correct the dependency reference.
cn.forwardDependency: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, dependent claims must only reference preceding claims. Change the dependency to reference an earlier claim.
cn.singleSentence: Per 审查指南 第二部分第二章, each claim must be a single sentence ending with one 。. Remove mid-claim periods or restructure into separate claims.
cn.refNumeralParens: Per 审查指南, reference numerals in claims should be enclosed in parentheses, e.g., (101) not 101. Verify the flagged claims.
cn.subjectConsistency: Per 审查指南 第二部分第二章, the subject matter (主题名称) of a dependent claim should match its parent claim's subject matter. Verify the flagged claims.
cn.transitionPhrase: Per 审查指南, independent claims should contain a characterizing transition such as '其特征在于' to delineate known elements from novel features. Verify the flagged claims.
cn.twTerminology: CNIPA uses '权利要求' for claims. '请求项' is Taiwan (TIPO) patent terminology. Replace all instances for CNIPA filing.
cn.claimsSpecReference: Per 审查指南 第二部分第二章, claims must not use '如说明书……所述' or '如图……所示' to define their scope. Claims must be self-contained. Remove these references.
cn.multiMultiDep: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, a multiple-dependent claim must not serve as the basis for another multiple-dependent claim. Restructure the dependency chain.
cn.dependentOrdering: Per 审查指南 第二部分第二章, all claims depending on an independent claim should appear consecutively before the next independent claim. Reorder claims.
cn.connectionRelationships: Components flagged: {{sample_names}} ({{component_count}} total). Add a connection verb (e.g., 连接, 设置于, 耦接) describing how these components are structurally arranged.
cn.abstractCharCount: Per 专利法实施细则 §23, the abstract must not exceed 300 Chinese characters. Shorten the abstract.
cn.abstractTitleMatch: Per 审查指南, the abstract should be consistent with the title (发明名称). Verify the abstract reflects the invention title.
cn.commercialLanguage: Per 专利法实施细则 §23, the abstract must not contain commercial advertising language (商业性宣传用语). Remove terms like 最优, 最佳, 世界领先, 国际领先, 国内首创, 填补空白, etc.
cn.antecedentBasisTerms: {{issue_count}} term(s) across {{claim_count}} claim(s) may lack antecedent basis. See the "Antecedent Basis Review" section below for the full per-term breakdown.
cn.titleMissing: Per CNIPA 审查指南 第一部分第一章, the specification must contain a 发明名称 (title of invention). Add a title to the specification header.

figureRefInconsistency.onlyDrawings: Only cited in 附图说明: {{figs}}
figureRefInconsistency.onlyEmbodiment: Only cited in 具体实施方式: {{figs}}

pass.multiMultiDep: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, a multiple-dependent claim may not serve as a basis for another multiple-dependent claim — chained multi-multi references make scope indeterminate.
pass.selfDependent: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, a claim may not depend on itself; dependent claims must reference an earlier claim.
pass.forwardDependency: Per 专利法实施细则 §22, a dependent claim may only reference earlier-numbered claims, not later ones.
pass.singleSentence: Per 审查指南 第二部分第二章, each claim must be a single sentence ending in 。 to keep scope unambiguous.
pass.transitionPhrase: Per 审查指南, an independent claim should contain a two-part transition (e.g. 其特征在于) separating the preamble (prior art) from the characterizing part (novel features).

tw.requiredSections: TIPO requires: 技術領域, 先前技術, 發明內容/新型內容, 實施方式. When drawings are present, 圖式簡單說明 and 符號說明 are also required. Missing: {{sections}}.
tw.sectionOrdering: 專利法施行細則 §17 prescribes: 技術領域 → 先前技術 → 發明內容/新型內容 → 圖式簡單說明 → 實施方式 → 符號說明. Reorder to match.
tw.paragraphNumbering: When present, paragraph numbers must use 【NNNN】 format with sequential four-digit numbers. Numbering is optional per 專利法施行細則 §17.
tw.paragraphEnding: Specification paragraphs should end with Chinese punctuation (。！？). Review flagged paragraphs.
tw.figureRefConsistency: Per 專利審查基準, figures described in 圖式簡單說明 should be referenced in 實施方式 and vice versa. Verify the flagged references are intentional.
tw.patentTypeTerminology: Invention patents (發明) should use 本發明, not 本新型. Utility models (新型) should use 本新型, not 本發明. Found: {{term}}.
tw.title: 發明名稱/新型名稱 should be concise with no trademarks, model numbers, or irrelevant text.
tw.claimReference: Per 專利法施行細則 §17, the specification must not reference specific claims (e.g., 如請求項N所述). Found: {{detail}}.
tw.symbolTablePresence: Per 專利法施行細則 §17, when 圖式簡單說明 is present, 符號說明 must also be included. Add a 符號說明 section listing reference numerals and component names.
tw.symbolTableConsistency: Per 專利審查基準, 符號說明 entries should match reference numerals used in 實施方式. Verify completeness.
tw.claimsSequential: Per 專利審查基準, claim numbers must be sequential starting from 1.
tw.dependencyFormat: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, dependencies must use a recognized format (如請求項N所述之, 如請求項N之, etc.). Review flagged claims.
tw.selfDependent: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, a claim cannot depend on itself. Self-dependent: {{claims}}.
tw.circularDependency: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, claims must not form circular dependency chains. Circular chain: 請求項 {{claims}}.
tw.forwardDependency: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, dependent claims must only reference preceding claims. Forward references: {{claims}}.
tw.singleSentence: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, each claim must be one sentence with exactly one 。 at the end. Review flagged claims.
tw.refNumeralParens: Per 專利法施行細則 §19, reference numerals in claims should be enclosed in parentheses, e.g., (101). Review flagged claims.
tw.subjectConsistency: Dependent claim subject matter should match the parent claim's subject matter. Review flagged claims.
tw.transitionPhrase: Per 專利法施行細則 §20, independent claims should contain a transitional phrase such as 其特徵在於 or 其改良在於. Review flagged claims.
tw.cnTerminology: Found simplified Chinese patent terminology: {{detail}}. TW documents should use TIPO terms (請求項, 說明書, 先前技術, 實施方式, etc.), not CNIPA terms (权利要求, 说明书, 背景技术, 具体实施方式, etc.).
tw.specDrawingRef: Per 專利法施行細則 §19, claims must not reference the specification or drawings (e.g., 如說明書所述, 如圖所示). Found: {{detail}}.
tw.multiDepOnMultiDep: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, a multi-dependent claim cannot directly or indirectly depend on another multi-dependent claim. Flagged: {{claims}}.
tw.multiDepAlternative: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, multi-dependent claims must use alternative form (或/任一項). Flagged: {{claims}}.
tw.titleSubjectMatch: Per TIPO 專利審查基準, the title should match the subject of independent claims. Review flagged claims.

symbolTableConsistency.missingFromTable: Numerals in claims undefined in 符號說明: {{numerals_with_locations}}

tw.antecedentBasis: 該/所述/前述 + noun should have a matching 一 + noun introduction in the same claim or a parent claim. Flagged terms may need review. Regex-based detection is approximate.
tw.abstractCharCount: Per 專利法施行細則 §21, the abstract should be within 250 characters. TIPO may not reject on length alone, but review for conciseness.
tw.abstractTitleMatch: Per 專利審查基準, the abstract should reference the 發明名稱/新型名稱. Verify the abstract reflects the title. Title: {{detail}}.
tw.commercialLanguage: Per 專利法施行細則 §21, the abstract must not contain commercial advertising language (商業性宣傳用語). Found: {{terms}}.
tw.representativeDrawing: Per 專利法施行細則 §21, when drawings exist, a 代表圖 should be designated. Review whether a representative drawing designation is needed.

symbolVsRepDrawing.nameMismatch: {{numeral}}: representative drawing symbol description has "{{rep_name}}", 符號說明 has "{{table_name}}"
symbolVsRepDrawing.description: Symbols listed in the representative drawing symbol description should match the definitions in 符號說明. Verify the flagged items.

tw.bracketFormat: Per 專利法施行細則 §17, section headers should use full-width brackets 【】. Found: {{detail}}.
tw.connectionRelationships: Components flagged: {{sample_names}} ({{component_count}} total). Add a connection verb (e.g., 連接, 設置於, 耦接) describing how these components are structurally arranged.
tw.antecedentBasisTerms: {{issue_count}} term(s) across {{claim_count}} claim(s) may lack antecedent basis. See the "Antecedent Basis Review" section below for the full per-term breakdown.
tw.titleMissing: Per TIPO 專利審查基準, the specification must contain a 發明名稱/新型名稱 (title of invention or utility model). Add one to the specification header.

figureRefInconsistency.onlyDrawings: Only cited in 圖式簡單說明: {{figs}}
figureRefInconsistency.onlyEmbodiment: Only cited in 實施方式: {{figs}}

symbolTableInconsistency.unreferenced: Defined in 符號說明 but not referenced in 實施方式: {{symbols}}
symbolTableInconsistency.undefined: Referenced in 實施方式 but not defined in 符號說明: {{symbols}}

tw.singleSentenceMissingPeriod: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, each claim must end with a single 。. Add the closing period to the flagged claims.
tw.singleSentenceMultiSentence: Per 專利法施行細則 §18, each claim must be one sentence with exactly one 。 at the end. Remove mid-claim 。 or restructure the flagged claims.

betaBadge.label: BETA
betaBadge.tooltip: Beta: some checks are still in development

consolidation.nounMismatchSummary: Preamble noun mismatch: {{count}} dependent claim(s) differ from Claim {{rootId}}

restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive wording found in specification.

paragraphSequential.missing: No paragraph numbering found in specification.

paragraphEnding.amend: Paragraphs with invalid or missing ending punctuation.
paragraphEnding.pass: All paragraphs have valid ending punctuation.

sequenceListing.amend: SEQ ID NO referenced but no sequence listing statement found.

crossReference.verify: Cross-reference section cites related applications — verify completeness.

priorArt.verify: Background section cites prior art — review characterizations.
priorArt.pass: No prior art citations found in background.

trackedChanges.amend: Document contains tracked changes (revisions). Accept or reject all changes before filing.

restrictiveWording.verify: Restrictive or indefinite wording found in claims.
restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive or indefinite wording found in claims.

missingPeriod.pass: All claims end with a period.

extraPeriod.amend: Claims with extra or misplaced periods.
extraPeriod.pass: No extra periods found in claims.

claims.missingTransition: Claim {{claimNumber}} is missing a transitional phrase (e.g., 'comprising', 'consisting of')
claims.missingTransitionDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} does not contain a recognized transitional phrase. Every claim must include a transitional phrase such as 'comprising', 'consisting of', 'consisting essentially of', 'including', 'containing', 'characterized by', or 'characterized in that' between the preamble and the claim body.

restrictiveWording.verify: Restrictive or improper wording found in abstract.
restrictiveWording.pass: No restrictive or improper wording found in abstract.

structure.amend: Abstract has extra paragraphs or invalid ending.
structure.pass: Abstract is a single paragraph with valid ending.

impliedPhrases.pass: No implied phrases found in abstract.

wordCount.amend: Abstract word count is outside the 50–150 range.
wordCount.pass: Abstract word count is within the 50–150 range.

singleFigure.amend: Single-figure patent uses 'FIG. 1' instead of 'The Figure'.

priorArt.verify: Prior art references found in drawings description — verify figure labeling.
priorArt.pass: No prior art references in drawings description.

sequential.amend: Figures are not in sequential order; missing: {{figure_list}}.

requiredSections.amend: Missing required sections: {{sections}} (专利法实施细则 §17).

sectionOrdering.amend: Specification sections out of prescribed order (专利法实施细则 §17).

paragraphNumbering.amendDocx: Specification contains manually-added paragraph numbering (must be removed for CNIPA filing).
paragraphNumbering.amendXmlGap: Gap in paragraph numbering — {{prev}} followed by {{next}}.

paragraphEnding.amend: {{count}} paragraph(s) not ending with valid Chinese punctuation: {{paragraphs}}.
paragraphEnding.pass: All specification paragraphs end with valid Chinese punctuation.

patentTypeTerminology.verify: '{{term}}' detected — verify this matches the filing type (invention vs. utility model).

claimReference.amend: Specification references claims in {{count}} paragraph(s) ({{paragraphs}}). Example: {{snippet}}
claimReference.pass: Specification does not reference the claims.

singleSentence.pass: All claims formed as single sentences.

refNumeralParens.verify: Reference numerals not in parentheses in {{count}} claim(s): {{claims}}.
refNumeralParens.pass: All reference numerals enclosed in parentheses.

subjectConsistency.verify: Subject matter inconsistent with parent in {{claims}} ({{count}} total).
subjectConsistency.pass: All dependent claim subject matter matches their parent.

transitionPhrase.verify: {{count}} independent claim(s) may lack a transition phrase: {{claims}}.
transitionPhrase.pass: All independent claims contain a transition phrase.

twTerminology.verify: TIPO terminology '请求项' detected — CNIPA filings must use '权利要求'.
twTerminology.pass: Claims use CNIPA terminology (权利要求).

specReference.amend: {{count}} claim(s) reference the specification or drawings: {{claims}}.
specReference.pass: No claim references to the specification or drawings.

multiMultiDep.amend: Multi-multi dependency in {{claims}}: a multiple-dependent claim depends on another multiple-dependent claim.

dependentOrdering.amend: Dependent claims not grouped after their independent claim.
dependentOrdering.pass: Dependent claims correctly grouped after their independent claim.

connectionRelationships.verify: Independent claim {{claim_id}} lists {{sample_names}} without a structural connection verb.
connectionRelationships.pass: All independent device/system claims describe component connections.

antecedentBasis.verify: {{issue_count}} term(s) in {{claims}} may lack antecedent basis.
antecedentBasis.pass: All claim terms have antecedent basis.

titleMatch.verify: Abstract does not reference the invention title (发明名称).
titleMatch.passCompound: All title components ({{halves}}) referenced in abstract.

commercialLanguage.amend: Commercial or advertising language in abstract: {{terms}}.
commercialLanguage.pass: Abstract free of commercial or advertising language.

requiredSections.amend: Missing required sections (專利法施行細則 §17).

sectionOrdering.amend: Specification sections out of prescribed order (專利法施行細則 §17).

paragraphNumbering.amendGap: Gap in paragraph numbering — 【{{prev}}】 followed by 【{{next}}】.

paragraphEnding.pass: All specification paragraphs end with valid punctuation.

patentTypeTerminology.verify: Patent-type terminology mismatch detected (invention vs. utility model).

claimReference.pass: Specification does not reference the claims.

symbolTablePresence.amend: Required 符號說明 section missing.

symbolTableConsistency.verify: 符號說明 entries inconsistent with 實施方式: {{symbol_table_inconsistency}}
symbolTableConsistency.pass: 符號說明 entries consistent with 實施方式.

singleSentence.pass: All claims formed as single sentences.

refNumeralParens.verify: Reference numerals not in parentheses in {{count}} claim(s): {{claims}}.
refNumeralParens.pass: All reference numerals enclosed in parentheses.

subjectConsistency.verify: Subject matter inconsistent with parent in {{claims}} ({{count}} total).
subjectConsistency.pass: All dependent claim subject matter matches their parent.

transitionPhrase.verify: {{count}} independent claim(s) missing a transition phrase: {{claims}}.
transitionPhrase.pass: All independent claims contain a transition phrase.

cnTerminology.verify: CNIPA terminology detected in TW document.

specDrawingRef.amend: Claim(s) reference the specification or drawings.
specDrawingRef.pass: No claim references to the specification or drawings.

multiDepOnMultiDep.amend: Multi-multi dependency: a multi-dependent claim depends on another multi-dependent claim.
multiDepOnMultiDep.pass: All multi-dependent claims have a valid dependency structure.

multiDepAlternative.amend: Multi-dependent claim(s) not drafted in alternative form.
multiDepAlternative.pass: All multi-dependent claims drafted in alternative form.

titleSubjectMatch.verify: Title "{{title}}" may not match the independent claim subjects: {{subjects}}.
titleSubjectMatch.pass: Title consistent with independent claim subjects.

symbolTableConsistency.verify: Reference numerals in claims inconsistent with 符號說明.
symbolTableConsistency.pass: Reference numerals in claims consistent with 符號說明.
symbolTableConsistency.noClaimNumerals: No reference numerals in claims; consistency check not applicable.

connectionRelationships.verify: Independent claim {{claim_id}} lists {{sample_names}} without a structural connection verb.
connectionRelationships.pass: All independent apparatus/system claims describe component connections.

antecedentBasis.verify: {{issue_count}} term(s) in {{claims}} may lack antecedent basis.
antecedentBasis.pass: All claim terms have antecedent basis.

titleMatch.verify: Abstract may not reference the invention/utility-model title (發明名稱/新型名稱).
titleMatch.passCompound: All title components ({{halves}}) referenced in abstract.

commercialLanguage.amend: Commercial or advertising language in abstract.
commercialLanguage.pass: Abstract free of commercial or advertising language.

symbolVsRepDrawing.verify: Representative drawing symbols inconsistent with 符號說明: {{symbol_mismatch_triples}}
symbolVsRepDrawing.pass: Representative drawing symbol description consistent with 符號說明.

bracketFormat.verify: Section headers may not use proper 【】bracket format.
bracketFormat.pass: All section headers use proper 【】bracket format.

loading.feature1_title: No Upload. No Account. No Install.
loading.feature1_desc: Your confidential patent drafts never leave your device. Nothing is uploaded, and PatentLint doesn't even know who you are.
loading.feature2_desc: Catches restrictive wording, indefinite terms, and antecedent basis gaps. Visualizes claim dependencies with an interactive tree.
loading.feature3_desc: Interactive dependency tree and Mermaid diagram show your claim structure at a glance.
loading.feature4_desc: Mac, Windows, Linux, iPad: any device with a browser. No Word add-in required. Full UI in English, 繁體中文, 简体中文, 日本語, and 한국어.
loading.feature5_desc: Drop a .docx file and get results in seconds. Download a PDF report, no cloud round-trip required.

pdf.securityNote: Analyzed on your device -- not uploaded to the cloud.
pdf.disclaimer: Generated by PatentLint. This report does not constitute legal advice. Review by a qualified patent professional is recommended.

checks.preamble_cross_category_mismatch: Cross-category preamble mismatch between dependent and independent claim.
checks.preamble_noun_mismatch: Preamble noun differs between dependent and independent claim.
checks.preamble_indefinite_article: Indefinite article in dependent claim preamble (should be 'The').
checks.spec_support_unsupported_terms: Claim terms not found in specification.
checks.spec_support_pass: All claim terms found in specification.
checks.required_sections_pass: All required sections per MPEP § 608.01(a) are present.
checks.figure_xref_pass: All figure references are consistent between Brief Description of Drawings and Detailed Description.
checks.figure_xref_orphaned_brief: Figure(s) described in Brief Description of Drawings but not referenced in Detailed Description.
checks.figure_xref_orphaned_detailed: Figure(s) referenced in Detailed Description but not described in Brief Description of Drawings.

claims.jepsonPriorArt: Claim {{claimNumber}} uses Jepson format — preamble elements are treated as admitted prior art (MPEP § 2129)
claims.jepsonPriorArtDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} is drafted in Jepson format. Under MPEP § 2129, the elements recited in the preamble of a Jepson claim are treated as an implied admission that they are prior art. Verify that this admission is intentional.
claims.crmNonTransitory: Claim {{claimNumber}}: computer-readable medium claim is missing 'non-transitory' qualifier
claims.crmNonTransitoryDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} recites a computer-readable medium without the 'non-transitory' qualifier. Without this qualifier, the claim covers transitory signals (e.g., carrier waves), which are not patent-eligible subject matter under 35 U.S.C. § 101. Add 'non-transitory' before the medium term.
claims.markushOpenTransition: Claim {{claimNumber}}: Markush group uses open-ended '{{transition}}' instead of 'consisting of'
claims.markushOpenTransitionDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} contains a Markush group using '{{transition}}' instead of the required 'consisting of'. Markush groups must use closed transitional language per MPEP § 2117. Using open-ended language may result in an improper Markush grouping rejection.
claims.omnibusClaim: Claim {{claimNumber}} appears to be an omnibus claim
claims.omnibusClaimDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} references the description or drawings without reciting specific technical features. Omnibus claims are categorically rejected under 35 U.S.C. § 112(b) in U.S. utility patents (MPEP § 2173.05(r)). Rewrite the claim to recite specific structural or method limitations.
claims.specialFormatsPass: No special claim format issues detected.
claims.missingPeriod: Claim {{claimNumber}} does not end with a period.
claims.missingPeriodDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} is missing its final period. Every claim must end with a single period per MPEP § 608.01(m).
claims.extraPeriod: Claim {{claimNumber}} contains extra or misplaced periods.
claims.extraPeriodDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} has periods in unexpected positions. A claim should contain only one period at the very end per MPEP § 608.01(m).
claims.whereinComma: Claim {{claimNumber}}: review comma usage before 'wherein' clause.
claims.whereinCommaDetails: Claim {{claimNumber}} may have incorrect comma placement around a 'wherein' clause. Review punctuation per MPEP § 608.01(m).
